headline: NTRS Post-Stress Test Policy: Does it Highlight Capital Strength?
summary: Northern Trust's proposed 10% dividend hike following the 2026 stress test highlights the bank's strong capital position.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on Northern Trust, Raises Price Target to $170
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Betsy Graseck   maintains Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $157 to $170.
